prompt: Starting a brand-new project: an audio-reactive Penrose tiling piece — rhombus tiles that pulse and spin with the music. Before we touch anything, be straight with me: does TouchDesigner actually have a Penrose tiling operator, or anything that generates aperiodic tilings natively? Search the knowledge base properly before you answer — if the KB is still warming up, wait it out and retry rather than guessing. If there's nothing native, don't fudge it — tell me plainly it doesn't exist, and lay out two or three realistic ways people actually do Penrose in TD, with a sentence on what each costs us in complexity. Don't build anything yet.
